final:
// // The output X is high when A1 is low and A2 is high, or when both B1 and C1 are low.
module top_module(
    input  A1  ,
    input  A2  ,
    input  B1  ,
    input  C1  ,
    output X   ,
    input  VPB ,
    input  VPWR,
    input  VGND,
    input  VNB
);assign X = (A1 & !A2) | (B1 & C1);

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // The output X is high when A1 is low and A2 is high, or when both B1 and C1 are low.
